title: Celebrate World Emoji Day with Interactive Noodles!

topics.title: World Emoji Day Feature
topics.summary: A new interactive noodle feature has been added to celebrate World Emoji Day on July 17. This animated noodle, designed by @trueberryless, enhances user engagement with emojis that react to pointer movements. The feature will be available from July 17-19, similar to previous event noodles.
